---
title: "cli_bootstrap.test.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/node/cli_bootstrap.test.ts"
loc: 45
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.60
style_score: 3.81
intel_score: 2.29
overall_score: 4.57
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 1 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://node:test)
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [assert](file://node:assert)
- [stat](file://node:fs/promises)
- [access](file://node:fs/promises)
- [constants](file://node:fs/promises)
- [join](file://node:path)
- [execa](file://execa)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)
- [*](file://node:fs)

### Exports
- `__dirname`
- `PROJECT_ROOT`
- `packageJsonPath`
- `cliPath`
- `pkg`
- `stats`
- `execa`
- `execa`
